parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor CenterCoordinator
participant ":DataFromLegacySystemUI" as UI
participant ":DataFromLegacySystemController" as Controller
participant ":ReadLegacyDataFile" as Reader
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":SNSUserStore" as SNSUserStore
participant ":App" as App
participant ":VaccinationCenter" as VaccinationCenter
participant ":Arrival" as Arrival
participant ":Departure" as Departure
participant ":VaccinationCentersStore" as VaccinationCentersStore

CenterCoordinator -> UI : 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 2 DataFromLegacySystemController()
activate Controller
Controller -> Company : 3 getVaccinationCentersStore()
activate Company
Company --> Controller : 4 returns the store
deactivate Company
Controller -> VaccinationCentersStore : 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinator(id)
activate VaccinationCentersStore
VaccinationCentersStore --> Controller : 6 returns the vaccination center
deactivate VaccinationCentersStore
Controller -> Reader : 7 ReadLegacyDataFile(center)
activate Reader
deactivate Controller
UI --> CenterCoordinator : 8 request path of the CSV file
deactivate UI

CenterCoordinator -> UI : 9 types path
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 10 readFile(path)
activate Controller
Controller -> Reader : 11 readFile(String path)
activate Reader

loop while csv has new lines
    Reader -> Reader : 12 validateFileLegacy(SNSUserNumber,\nfirstDate,secondDate,thirdDate,fourthDate)
    Reader -> Reader : 13 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called\nlegacyDataList
end

Reader -> Company : 14 getSNSUserList()
activate Company
Company -> SNSUserStore : 15 getSNSUserList()
activate SNSUserStore
SNSUserStore --> Company : 16 returns list
deactivate SNSUserStore
Company --> Reader : 17 returns list
deactivate Company

Reader -> Company : 18 getVaccineList()
activate Company
Company --> Reader : 19 returns list
deactivate Company

loop while legacyDataList has new lines
    Reader -> Reader : 20 findPosOfSNSUser(snsUsersList,\nvalues,positionInSnsUserList)
    Reader -> Reader : 21 findPosOfVax(vaccineList,values,positionInVaccinesList)
    Reader -> Reader : 22 checksDuplicates(updatedList,snsUsersList,vaccineList,positionInSnsUserList,positionInVaccinesList,lineOfTheData)
    Reader -> Reader : 23 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called updatedList
    Reader -> VaccinationCenter : 24 createArrival()
    activate VaccinationCenter
    VaccinationCenter -> Arrival : 25 createArrival()
    activate Arrival
    Arrival --> VaccinationCenter : 26 returns Arrival
    deactivate Arrival
    VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter : 27 Saves arrival into List<Arrival> called arrivalsList
    VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter : 28 genericsArrivals.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_ARRIVALS, arrivalsList)
    deactivate VaccinationCenter
    
    Reader -> VaccinationCenter : 29 createDeparture()
    activate VaccinationCenter
    VaccinationCenter -> Departure : 30 createDeparture()
    activate Departure
    Departure --> VaccinationCenter : 31 returns departure
    deactivate Departure
    VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter : 32 Saves departure into List<Departure> called departuresList
    VaccinationCenter -> VaccinationCenter : 33 genericsDeparture.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_DEPARTURES, departuresList)
    deactivate VaccinationCenter
end

Reader --> Controller : 34 returns updatedList
deactivate Reader
Controller --> UI : 35 returns updatedList
deactivate Controller
UI --> CenterCoordinator : 36 requests the option to sort
deactivate UI

CenterCoordinator -> UI : 37 selects option
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 38 chooseCriteriaToSort(option)
activate Controller
Controller -> Reader : 39 setList(Option)
activate Reader
loop while updatedList has new lines
    Reader -> Reader : 40 Saves dates to a\nList<LocalDateTime>\ncalled listToSort
end
deactivate Reader
deactivate Controller
UI --> CenterCoordinator : 41 requests the order of the sort
deactivate UI

alt algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "0 - Ascending"
    CenterCoordinator -> UI : 42 selects order
    activate UI
    UI -> Controller : 43 getAlgorithm()
    activate Controller
    Controller -> App : 44 getSortingAlgorithm()
    activate App
    App --> Controller : 45 returns algorithm
    deactivate App
    Controller --> UI : 46 returns algorithm
    deactivate Controller
    UI -> Controller : 47 sortListWithAlgo(algorithmToBeUsed,option)
    activate Controller
    note right of Controller
        algorithmToBeUsed can be InsertionSort or HeapSort, both have methods that
        can sort in ascending/descending order, here we are just representing
        the InsertionSort algorithm because HeapSort functions in a similar way.
    end note
    Controller -> Controller : 48 insertionSortAscending()
    Controller --> Controller : 49 returns sortedList
    Controller --> UI : 50 returns sortedList
    deactivate Controller
    UI --> CenterCoordinator : 51 prints sortedList
    deactivate UI
else algorithmToBeUsed = "InsertionSort", option = "1 - Descending"
    CenterCoordinator -> UI : 52 selects order
    activate UI
    UI -> Controller : 53 getAlgorithm()
    activate Controller
    Controller -> App : 54 getSortingAlgorithm()
    activate App
    App --> Controller : 55 returns algorithm
    deactivate App
    Controller --> UI : 56 returns algorithm
    deactivate Controller
    UI -> Controller : 57 sortListWithAlgo(algorithmToBeUsed,option)
    activate Controller
    Controller -> Controller : 58 insertionSortDescending()
    Controller --> Controller : 59 returns sortedList
    Controller --> UI : 60 returns sortedList
    deactivate Controller
    UI --> CenterCoordinator : 61 prints sortedList
    deactivate UI
end

@enduml
```
